vibe: Dark Atelier - A minimalist, realistic intersection of a sterile developer terminal and a textured artist studio. High contrast between code (Mono) and art (Serif).

headings.style: Expressive, organic, editorial art. Use font-light for elegance or font-medium. Tight tracking.

body.style: Sterile, precise, tech-focused. Use for all paragraphs, labels, and UI elements.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Section padding should be py-24 or py-32. Gap sizes in grids should be gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Tetris' Grid (Asymmetric Bento) for projects and art. Never fill the grid completely—leave negative space for breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Prefer left-alignment for text blocks. Asymmetrical placement of images.

components_and_surfaces.cards: Flat background (background_secondary), 1px subtle border (border_color), NO shadow. Hover state: border color darkens to accent_primary, slight opacity shift on image.
components_and_surfaces.buttons: Minimalist. Either 1px solid border with transparent background and text_primary, or solid accent_primary background with background_primary text. Hover: Invert colors or add a subtle text shadow.
components_and_surfaces.inputs: Shadcn based. Customization: Remove border-radius entirely (rounded-none). Use border-b only or a sharp 1px full border. Background transparent. Focus: border-accent_primary.
components_and_surfaces.navbar: Sticky top. Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-[#0F0F0F]/80, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border-white/5. Links in uppercase mono font.
components_and_surfaces.textures: MANDATORY: Implement a subtle, fixed full-screen SVG noise/grain overlay (pointer-events-none, opacity 5-10%) to remove digital flatness and add a 'realistic/film' feel.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Images in galleries should have a very slow, subtle scale effect (scale-105 duration-700). Text links should have a 1px underline that expands from left to right on hover.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion.

sections_breakdown.hero: Overlapping layers. Abstract background image (hero_background) with low opacity (bg-[#0F0F0F]/70) blending to background_primary at bottom. Giant serif heading 'JUST ALEKS'. Mono subheading '> IT Developer && Visual Artist'.
sections_breakdown.about: Split layout. Left: about_profile image. Right: Narrative text mixing tech stack logic with artistic philosophy.
sections_breakdown.it_projects: Rigid bento grid. Images (it_project_1, it_project_2). Mono typography dominates here. GitHub links styled as terminal commands.
sections_breakdown.art_gallery: Masonry or staggered grid. Images (art_gallery_1, art_gallery_2). Serif typography dominates here. Focus on imagery with minimal captions.
sections_breakdown.skills: Slow horizontal marquee (react-fast-marquee). Outlined large text or muted small mono text widely spaced.
sections_breakdown.contact: Minimalist form. Large 'Let\'s Build / Create' serif heading. Sharp, border-only input fields.

hero_background.description: Abstract realistic dark texture with subtle grid lines and charcoal strokes.

about_profile.description: Cinematic portrait in a dark atelier, mixed lighting (warm lamp + cool monitor).

it_project_1.description: Aesthetic close-up of a code editor, muted colors.

it_project_2.description: Minimalist geometric tech architecture in dark grey.

art_gallery_1.description: Minimalist raw stone and metal sculpture.

art_gallery_2.description: Abstract oil painting with heavy texture, raw umber.

testing_and_accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, nav links) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-about-link', data-testid='contact-submit-button').
testing_and_accessibility.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio on text over the grain texture. Add aria-labels to gallery images. Focus rings must be sharp and use accent_primary.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a static React application using HTML/Tailwind for layout and customized Shadcn UI for interactive components.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Only use the URLs provided in the media section.
Include a global CSS grain/noise overlay to give the site a tactile, realistic feel. It must have pointer-events: none.
Set up Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Import Cormorant Garamond and IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts.
Ensure the hero section overlay isn't too dark; the abstract background must be visible (use max bg-black/50 or a gradient).
For the art gallery, use standard div-based grid layouts (CSS grid or flex masonry) but ensure images are not cropped awkwardly.
Use Phosphor Icons (or lucide-react if Phosphor isn't available) with a thin weight.
